I work with small businesses.
What does your company do?

Hello! Welcome to the mission. My name is Daniel, and I am from Portugal.
Nice to meet you, Daniel. Let me introduce myself. I am Flavia, a consultant at Sebrae in Brazil.
I work with small companies too. What does Sebrae do?
We help small businesses and local products grow in many regions.
Do you visit these companies often?
Yes, I do. My colleague and I visit companies every week.
Great. And what are you doing here at the mission today?
Right now, I am presenting our projects and meeting new partners.
My name is Flavia, and I am a consultant at Sebrae.
I work with small businesses and local products in many regions.
My team and I visit companies every week.
What does your company do, and where are you from?
Right now, I am presenting our projects at the mission.

Hi Flavia, it's Ana from the office. Your international mission starts next Monday. Right now, the team is preparing your presentation and your agenda. Remember your plan: you introduce yourself first, then you talk about our small businesses and projects. Many partners are arriving from other countries, so speak slowly and with confidence. Good luck, and call me if you need any detail!

Good morning, everyone, and welcome to the International Small Business Mission. The event is starting now. On the main stage, a consultant from Brazil is presenting her projects. In room two, partners are meeting new companies, and many visitors are asking questions. Right now, coffee is available near the entrance. Please introduce yourself to a new partner and enjoy the mission!

First, Flavia reviews her words to introduce herself and her work. Then she prepares an agenda and a short project to present. Next, she practices her one-minute presentation out loud. On the day of the mission, she introduces herself to the partners. Finally, she answers their questions and presents her projects with confidence.
